---
title: "compare_quants"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-08"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
```


```{r}

flair_v3_data = read.csv("FLAIR-v3.0.0.ref_quant_compare.tsv", header=T, sep="\t")

flair_v3_data %>% head()

```

```{r}

flair_v3_data %>% ggplot(aes(y=ref_tpm, x=`FLAIR.v3.0.0_tpm`)) + geom_point() +
  scale_x_log10() + scale_y_log10() +
  theme_bw()
 
```

```{r}

LRAA_data = read.csv("LRAA.ref_quant_compare.tsv", header=T, sep="\t")


LRAA_data %>% head()

```

```{r}

LRAA_data %>% ggplot(aes(y=ref_tpm, x=`LRAA_tpm`)) + geom_point() +
  scale_x_log10() + scale_y_log10() +
  theme_bw()
 


```
